title: nervilia affinis
intro: Nervilia affinis, also known as the yellow form of the fan orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nervilia affinis include reducing fever, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin irritations, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
